# Docs

Parent: [Moonshine](../README.md)

Local documentation and operator notes for the Docs surface.

## Key Files

- `AGENT-BROWSER.md`: Local documentation file.
- `browser-action.schema.json`: JSON contract emitted by `browser-step`.
- `agent-tooling-user-stories-agent-pov.md`: 64 user stories for agentic tooling design, from a calling agent's perspective.
- `agent-tooling-user-stories-tool-pov.md`: 64 user stories for agentic tooling design, from a tool's own perspective.
- `agent-tooling-user-stories-runtime-pov.md`: 64 user stories for agentic tooling design, from the agentic runtime's perspective.
- `agent-tooling-user-stories-user-pov.md`: 64 user stories for agentic tooling design, from the human user's perspective.
- `agent-tooling-user-stories-operator-pov.md`: 64 user stories for agentic tooling design, from the $$/security-conscious solo platform operator's perspective.
- `agent-tooling-user-stories-superset-by-area.md`: all 320 stories above, coalesced and regrouped by 13 cross-cutting areas of influence instead of by perspective.
- `agentic-tooling-gap-audit.md`: 61-agent gap-coverage audit judging all 320 stories against the actual repo state (MET/PARTIAL/MISSING/UNCLEAR, cited to real files).
- `agentic-tooling-wave-plan.md`: compounding wave sequence for closing the audit's gaps, ordered so each wave unlocks or cheapens the next.

## Usage

Use this README as the local map for this directory. Keep implementation details near the owning source files, and update this document when the directory contract changes.

## Verification

Run the closest package or app-level check through the repository-owned `a0` or `monster` target after changing behavior in this directory.
